sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51292" key="i)sxadw/nhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσχᾰδώνης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n51292.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">buyer of figs</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
